description: Unofficial read-only MCP server for your local WhatsApp chat history (stays on your machine).
name: io.github.NabheetCloud/wa-chat-reader

environmentVariables.description: Semicolon-separated paths to ChatStorage.sqlite. If unset, a platform default is used.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_DB_PATHS

environmentVariables.description: Semicolon-separated fallback database paths, tried after the primary paths.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_BACKUP_PATHS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum look-back window in days a caller may request.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_MAX_DAYS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' for verbose logging to stderr.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_DEBUG

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to also write logs to a file.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_LOG_FILE

title: WhatsApp Chat Reader (Unofficial)
